docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED MERCHANTS ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNIA CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT BURMAN, ROBERT M IND & DBA CITY GARDENING SERVICES
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $3,096.73 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED MERCHANTS ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNIA CORP.
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BURMAN, ROBERT M IND & DBA CITY GARDENING SERVICES $3,333.41 PRINCIPAL, $3,096.73 INTEREST, $23.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,453.14, RENEWAL OF OLD CASE #047955. ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

PROOF OF SERVICE OF FOR APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED MERCHANTS ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNIA CORP. SERVED JUN-12-2001, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT BURMAN, ROBERT M IND & DBA CITY GARDENING SERVICES
PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. A WRIT MAY BE ISSUED ON JULY 18, 2001, IF NO MOTION IS FILED BY DEFENDANT.
